message:
feat(abi): add 6 new ABI modules for fortify, glibc internals, IO internals, ISO C, RPC, and C23 stdbit

Introduce six entirely new ABI surface modules totaling ~5,000 lines:

- fortify_abi.rs (1045 lines): _FORTIFY_SOURCE __*_chk wrappers for
  GCC/Clang -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 builds. Covers __memcpy_chk,
  __sprintf_chk, __vsnprintf_chk, __fgets_chk, __read_chk,
  __longjmp_chk, and ~40 other fortified variants with proper
  buffer-length validation and __chk_fail abort on overflow.

- glibc_internal_abi.rs (968 lines): Internal glibc double-underscore
  aliases (__ctype_*, __libc_*, __pthread_*, __sched_*, __res_*) via
  dlsym(RTLD_NEXT) macro-driven call-through. Covers environ, obstack,
  sys_* tables, and miscellaneous glibc internal symbols that programs
  compiled against glibc may reference directly.

- io_internal_abi.rs (1371 lines): All 114 internal glibc _IO_* libio
  symbols as pure dlsym(RTLD_NEXT) call-throughs. Covers _IO_list_all,
  _IO_file_*, _IO_str_*, _IO_default_*, _IO_do_*, and other internal
  FILE stream manipulation functions with LazyLock-cached symbol
  resolution.

- isoc_abi.rs (450 lines): Consolidated ISO C99/C23 __isoc99_* and
  __isoc23_* internal-linkage aliases that GCC/Clang emit with
  -std=c99/-std=c23. Covers 38 wrappers: 12 narrow scanf, 6 wide
  scanf (C23), 6 wide scanf (C99), 10 strtol-family, and wcstol/imaxabs
  variants.

- rpc_abi.rs (676 lines): Sun ONC RPC / XDR / SVC function coverage
  from glibc's <rpc/*.h> headers. All symbols are dlsym(RTLD_NEXT)
  call-throughs since they interact with internal RPC runtime state.
  Covers xdr_*, clnt*, svc*, auth*, pmap_*, and des_crypt functions.

- stdbit_abi.rs (442 lines): C23 <stdbit.h> type-generic bit
  manipulation utilities — 14 operations x 5 unsigned integer types =
  70 pure Rust functions. Covers stdc_leading_zeros, stdc_leading_ones,
  stdc_trailing_zeros, stdc_trailing_ones, stdc_first_leading_zero/one,
  stdc_first_trailing_zero/one, stdc_count_ones/zeros,
  stdc_has_single_bit, stdc_bit_width, stdc_bit_floor, stdc_bit_ceil.

- lib.rs: Register all 6 new modules with appropriate #[cfg(not(test))]
  gating to prevent symbol recursion in test builds. stdbit_abi is
  ungated (phase-1, pure Rust, no syscalls).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
